event: View of the Basilica of St. Lawrence Outside the Walls
symbols: basilica facade — the enduring presence of the Church in the world
bell tower — the call to worship echoing through the ages
description: An architectural etching depicting a large classical church building with a columned portico and triangular pediment. A tall bell tower rises behind the main structure. To the left, an iron gate and wall enclose a courtyard area. Small human figures and horse-drawn vehicles appear in the foreground street. Trees and additional buildings are visible to the right. The rendering is highly detailed with fine line work characteristic of architectural engravings.

_meta.title: View of the Basilica of St. Lawrence Outside the Walls
